name: superdev
description: Superdev — a workspace-scope-agnostic, package-manager-agnostic, self-improving Claude Code plugin bundling 16 skills and 49 subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. v1.3.0 adds opinionated frontend modular architecture (no god-files, dedicated Zustand stores per module, sub-sub-components in parts/<name>/ folders with shadcn Portal primitives) and atomic one-module refactoring (single-commit conversion with zero-drift verification and hard rollback).

plugins.name: superdev
plugins.description: 16 production-grade skills + 49 specialized subagents for full-stack monorepo builds. Workspace-scope and package-manager agnostic. Self-improving via .claude/memory/superdev-learned/. v1.3.0 adds frontend-modular-architecture (page ≤ 100 / component ≤ 200 / dedicated Zustand stores / per-step wizards / parts/<name>/ folders with Portal primitives) + frontend-refactoring (atomic one-module conversion: plan → snapshot → execute → verify → rollback-on-drift). Other skills: prd-design-build-orchestrator, design-to-nextjs, design-preservation, nestjs-enterprise-backend, security-review-and-fix, prototype-to-saas (now with Phase 4.5 decomposition before rewiring), exploratory-qa, systematic-debugging, product-completeness-audit, brutal-exhaustive-audit, superdev-self-learning, laravel-enterprise-backend, laravel-bref-deploy, design-to-laravel (Claude Design → Laravel + Inertia React monolith), chosen via orchestrator backend- and frontend-stack gates.
